content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！
《忘却前夜》OST：虚妄倒错之孕 已发布，欢迎收听、下载及分享。
如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！（二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用）

忘却前夜OST：虚妄倒错之孕
父亲诞下女儿，女儿孕育父亲。
虚妄、倒错、她所坠入的循环往复的命运。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
规划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST: "Pregnancy of Pervase Lies" was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

Morimens OST: Pregnancy of Pervase Lies
The Father births a Daughter. The Daughter then conceives Her Father.
Illusion, inversion—the cyclical, ever-repeating fate into which she has fallen.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：虚妄倒错之孕
